title: Wire test runner in package.json
description: Replace the placeholder test script in package.json with the node:test runner command so tests can be discovered and executed via npm test.
acceptance_criteria: package.json scripts.test is set to 'node --test src/index.test.js'
Running npm test does not throw 'no tests yet' output

title: Extend hello() with style parameter
description: Add a second parameter style ('formal' | 'casual' | 'pirate') to the hello() function in src/index.js, defaulting to 'casual'. Use a STYLES map to produce different greeting formats per style; unknown styles fall back to 'casual'.
acceptance_criteria: hello('Alice') returns a casual greeting (default unchanged behaviour)
hello('Alice', 'formal') returns a formal greeting distinct from casual
hello('Alice', 'unknown') falls back to the casual greeting without throwing

title: Write unit tests for greeting styles
description: Create src/index.test.js using node:test (no new dependencies). Cover: default casual style, explicit casual, formal, pirate, and unknown-style fallback.
acceptance_criteria: All 5 test cases pass: default, casual, formal, pirate, unknown-style fallback
No external test-framework dependencies added to package.json
